name: Bulk Italian Sausage
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds pork shoulder, butt portion, trimmed and cut into large chunks
1/2 pound pork fat, cut into large chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the pork into a large bowl. Add the salt, anise, peppers, oregano, thyme, and water. Mix well to coat the meat.
2. Work the seasoned pork, pork fat, and garlic through a meat grinder, using the disc with the largest holes and alternating ingredients as you grind.
3. The Italian Sausage may be stored for up to 5 days in the refrigerator or 6 months in the freezer.
